feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S4 Upgrade: Starting the Shadow Instance after a reboot
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I am having troubles when restarting a shadow instance after a reboot.

I have sucessfully started the classical (non shadow instance) with sapcontrol.

I have started the sapstartsrv for the shadow (D02):
# su - xxxadm
% /usr/sap/XXX/SUM/abap/exe/sapstartsrv pf=/usr/sap/XXX/SUM/abap/system/XXX/SYS/profile/XXX_D02_xxxxxx -D -u xxxadm

When I start the shadown the enqueue and the message server start.
But the dispatcher does not start:
# grep -i err dev_disp
rdisp/ms_conn_error_handling: suspend/suspend timeout/resume delay = 1/300/10
*** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W0 (pid 9203) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549]
SECTION: Last Error Information
|No |Pid |Type|State |Cause|Err|Prio|Sess-Key |Sess-Type|Locked|Sem|Time |Program |Cli|User |Action |Action-Info |
*** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W1 (pid 9204) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549]
...

*** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W28 (pid 9231) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549]
*** DP_FATAL_ERROR => DpWpCheck: no more work processes
|No |Pid |Type|State |Cause|Err|Prio|Sess-Key |Sess-Type|Locked|Sem|Time |Program |Cli|User |Action |Action-Info |
|No |Pid |Type|State |Cause|Err|Prio|Sess-Key |Sess-Type|Locked|Sem|Time |Program |Cli|User |Action |Action-Info |
return errno (-17) to T0_U1
DpTmSend: errormsg without overhead: take session 0
*** ERROR => NiIWrite: SiSendV failed for hdl 33/sock 14
*** ERROR => DpTmSend: NiBufSend failed(rc=-6: NIECONN_BROKEN)->disconnect T0_U1 [dpTerminal.c 1332]
AdCvtRecToExt: opcode 60 (AD_SELFIDENT), ser 0, ex 0, errno 0
AdCvtRecToExt: opcode 40 (AD_MSBUF), ser 0, ex 0, errno 0
AdCvtRecToExt: opcode 40 (AD_MSBUF), ser 0, ex 0, errno 0

Would you know what I have missed for starting this shadow instance.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Easily perform a mass reset of expired or unused initial user passwords SU10
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

To easily and quickly reset an expired or unused initial password, we need to follow these steps:

1.Use the SAP report RSUSR200, which we will execute from transaction SE38,or execute the SU10 transaction and select the " logon data" button.

 

Execute the SU10 transaction and select the logon data button :

 

 

Or Report RSUSR200 from se38:

In this report, filter by the following fields to generate a list of users who are experiencing issues with their initial password:

Select filters:

Execute : 

List of Users:

 

We export the usernames from the User column to a spreadsheet.

2. Execute the SU10 transaction and select the "Address  Data"  button:

 

Select the 'User' field and in the Multiple selection for S_BANAME, choose upload from the clipboard and copy the list of users from the spreadsheet.

 

Copy and execute 

 

1.Select All

2.Click Transfer button

 

On this screen, choose 'Select All' once more:

 

 

Click Change password 

 

Click Generate button

A new initial password will be created for the selected users. After execution, a list will appear with the text message: Generate password for user XXXXXX

 

I hope this can be helpful to someone. 😉

Thanks in advance

Best Regards!

entry.title: Purchase requisitions are not visible in clip icon in Workflow.
entry.content:
I have created PR (ME51N) with the attachment file. but the attachment is not visible in Workflow

Could anyone please suggest a solution?

Thanks

entry.title: Maintain classification in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts

We would like to implement S/4HANA International Trade. What are the options to mass create control classes (ECCN)? From the SAP best practices, there seem to be a direct integration with a data provider. But would it be possible to load a file (XML or CSV) without setting up an integration with data providers?

 

Thanks in advance,

Stéphanie

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - Email Notification for Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've configured the below steps to achieve email notification for Credit Memo Process Approval Workflow, but still I'm not able to receive a email notification for the same. Please advice if I'm missing anything in here.

1. Created workflow rules for Credit Memo and also did Manage Teams and Responsibilities

2. Created a custom template using Maintain Email Template (Approval Request for Credit Memo Request SD_SLS_CMR_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL)

3. Configured Sender Email Address

4. Changed the settings in Output Parameter Determination.

Still I'm not receiving an email after the creation of Credit Memo. 

Please advice.

Thanks,

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Batch jobs information required
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We need SAP recommendation for below programs, can you please tell what is the use of below standard program and if we need to setup batch jobs for this program. If yes, what is the frequency.  

  1. UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE - Component CA-UI5-ABA-AIDX
  2.  /UI5/UPD_ODATA_METADATA_CACHE - Component CA-UI5-ABA-AIDX

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I use variable value in inner join in SQLScript
entry.content:
Hello,

Please direct me to use the value in the mat_table in the inner join in a different SQL.

The mat_table has the value /1MD/MD______038. I want to use the table name in the second query. Currently, I've hard coded. I like to replace with dynamic value.

Thank you,

William

mat_table =

  1.       select physical_name

        from

        (

            select   physical_name,

            ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY physical_name

                       ORDER BY version desc) RANK_COLUMN

            from mdg_gn_tgobj

            where logical_name = 'TCK_MM_MATERIAL' order by version desc

        ) where rank_column = 1;

2nd query as under

tusmd1213 =

        select

            usmd120c.usmd_crequest as usmd_crequest,

            usmd_seqnr,

            "/1MD/MMMATERIAL" as matnr,

            right(usmd_value,13) as usmd_value,

            right(usmd_value,1) as right_val,

            CASE

                when right(usmd_value,1) = '-'

                        then CONCAT(CONCAT( 'MM   USMDKMMMATERIAL               ',usmd120c.usmd_crequest),right(usmd_value,13))

                ELSE         CONCAT(CONCAT( 'MM   USMDKMMMATERIAL               ',usmd120c.usmd_crequest),right(usmd_value,12))

            END as objectid

 

        FROM usmd120c

 

--     Select material Only

        inner join usmd1213

        on    usmd1213.usmd_crequest = usmd120c.usmd_crequest

        and   usmd1213.usmd_entity      = 'MATERIAL'

        and   usmd1213.usmd_entity_obj  = 'MATERIAL'

 

--      Link WITH usmd110c to determine MM only

        inner join Usmd110C

        ON    usmd120c.usmd_creq_type = Usmd110C.usmd_creq_type

        AND   usmd110c.usmd_model   = 'MM'

        and   usmd110c.mandt        = :p_clnt

 

--      Get the material from the table

       inner join "/1MD/MD______038" as _md038   ( Need to change with dynamic value instead of hardcoded )

   

        on _md038.USMDKMMMATERIAL = right(usmd_value,13)

      where     usmd120c.usmd_crequest in (   '000000084178')

;

entry.title: Where can I get the event specification for a custom RAP BO event defined in S/4HANA on-premise?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have developed a custom event based on RAP BO to trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation. In order to create a custom event project, we need to upload an event specification from the Build Lobby.

Now, my question is where I can get the event specification for a custom event in S/4HANA on-premise? For S/4HANA Public Cloud, I've seen the "Maintain Event Channel Binding" Fiori app was used to get the metadata, but I cannot find the same option in the channel configuration customizing.

Any input is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: DO document flow status remains In process , even after the billing document is created
Spool server is having an error when it is requested multiple pages for an adobe form
entry.content:
Good morning gurus, 

I have a requirement to generate a spool with an adobe form with multiple same pages. The form contains 1 page and the number of pages that are going to be created is specified in nast-anzal field. In my printing program I set the following fields to allow the spool creation:

gs_outputparams-dest = nast-ldest.
gs_outputparams-reqnew = abap_true.
gs_outputparams-covtitle = nast-objky.
gs_outputparams-reqimm = abap_true.

I first call FP_JOB_OPEN (which receives the mentioned fields) and after that I iterate (based on the anzal field) the call to the form function. When testing with the device LP01 (with device type PDFUC) it was working as expected, several same pages in one form. But when changed to the required output device (with device type ricoh), it works fine when generating 1 page, but when it is required more pages, it fails and the spool is completed with 0 pages. I have checked and it fails in the form function in the 3rd iteration with status 2 (system error). I guess it is happening because of the device type but I cannot change it so, does anyone know how to prepare the form so the device accepts it or another way to print multiple pages without iteration?

entry.title: rounding differences valuated stock in transit
entry.content:
Hello,

we use a two step stock transfert process using valuated stock in transit (S/4, ML active).

If material is posted from one plant to the stock in transit of the same plant (same plant, same price), a price difference (rounding difference ?) of 1 cent arises, which is then posted to a price variance account.

Can anyone explain how/why this price variance occurs and whether it can be prevented?

Regards,

Sabine

entry.title: Partner Determination for Item proposal does not function correctly
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

Can anyone tell me if we can use partner assignment to Item Proposal?

In SPRO,  I am able to Assign Partner determination procedure "TA" to Document Type "PV" at header level and procedure "N" to Item category "PVN" at item level.

However after creating Item Proposal (VA51) and then trying to click on Partners Tab in change mode (VA52),  get following error. 

FB call: insufficient parameters

Message no. VP107

Has anyone used partner determination for Item Proposal before?

Thanks,

Girish

entry.title: BP sensitive data change workflow
entry.content:
Dear all, 

For a client project, we need to implement a Business Partner workflow for changes in sensitive fields such as bank account information. Is there a possibility to accomplish this using SAP standard or through a BTP Package ? We don't want to use MDG BRF+.

SAP provides the following package for BP creation, but I couldn't find a package for business partner changes: 

  • https://api.sap.com/package/businesspartnercreationapprovalprocess/overview
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/business-partner-creation-approval-process-using-sap-workflow-management/ba-p/13517727

Thank you in advance for for your help. 

Achraf

entry.title: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have configured Event Mesh (in Integration Suite) and SAP Build Process Automation to start a process when a journal entiry is created in S/4HANA on-premise.

A webhook subscription has been created in Event Mesh, and the handshake was successful.

 

A process has been created with an event trigger, and deployed.

When a journal entry is created in S/4HANA, the number of t"Message Queued" increased to 1, and soon decreased to 0. This indicates that the message was sent to the webhook (Build Process Automation).

However, no process started in Build Process Automation. Now I am wondering where the message has gone.

Monitoroing > Event Aquisition > Business Events shows no data.

Could anyone tell me where such "lost" events can be monitored and investigated?

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: A detailed list of specific Production Planning (PP) transaction changes
entry.content:
A detailed list of specific Production Planning (PP) transaction changes and guidance on exploring Fiori apps in SAP S/4HANA, including RISE with SAP.

Detailed List of PP Transaction Changes

Material Requirements Planning (MRP):

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

MD01 (MRP Run)MD01N (MRP Live)Simplified and optimized for HANA.
MD02 (Single-item, Multi-level)ObsoleteUse MD01N or Fiori app for MRP Live.
MD04 (Stock/Requirements List)MD04 or Fiori appThe existing t-code is enhanced but Fiori is better.
MD05 (Individual Planning)ObsoleteReplaced with MRP Live functionality.
MD06/MD07 (Planning List)SameNo major changes; still supported.

Capacity Planning:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CM01 (Capacity Evaluation)CM01 or Fiori appEnhanced via Fiori apps for better visuals.
CM21 (Capacity Leveling)SameGUI transaction is still available.
CM25 (Capacity Leveling Graphic)SameUse graphical planning in S/4HANA GUI or Fiori.

Production Orders:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CO01 (Create Production Order)SameGUI is still supported, and Fiori apps are also available.
CO02 (Change Production Order)SameEnhanced with Fiori app "Manage Production Orders."
CO03 (Display Production Order)SameUse the Fiori app for better visualization.
CO41 (Order Information System)CO41 or Fiori appEnhanced reporting via Fiori apps.

Bills of Material (BOM):

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CS01/CS02/CS03 (Create/Change/Display BOM)SameNo significant changes.
CS11/CS12 (BOM Explosion)SameGUI is supported, but Fiori apps offer advanced analytics.

Work Centers:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CR01/CR02/CR03 (Create/Change/Display Work Centers)SameNo changes; GUI transactions remain.
CR10 (Capacity Display)Fiori appReplace "Monitor Work Centers" with Fiori.

Production Planning Table:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

MF50 (Planning Table)Same or Fiori appGUI remains but the Fiori app provides enhancements.

Guidance to Explore Fiori Apps for PP

SAP S/4HANA introduces Fiori apps to modernize and streamline production planning processes. Here’s how to explore them:

1. Access the Fiori Launchpad

  • The Fiori Launchpad is the primary interface for accessing Fiori apps.
  • Ask your SAP Basis team for the Fiori URL 

2. Use the Fiori App Library

SAP provides a complete list of available Fiori apps online:

  • Visit the SAP Fiori Apps Library.
  • Steps to explore PP-related apps:
    1. Use the search bar to find apps by keywords like "Production Planning," "MRP," or "Work Centers."
    2. Filter by S/4HANA version and deployment (e.g., RISE with SAP).
    3. Check prerequisites for each app, including roles and authorizations.

3. Key Fiori Apps for Production Planning

App Name Purpose

"Monitor Material Coverage"Replaces MD04 with enhanced analytics.
"Schedule Production Orders"Graphical scheduling and optimization.
"Manage Production Orders"Replaces CO01/CO02/CO03.
"Monitor Work Center Utilization"Visualizes capacity planning.
"Manage Bills of Material"BOM management with a user-friendly interface.
"Analyze Capacity Utilization"Advanced reporting for work centers.

entry.title: Change credit segment for sales area -- query on impact
entry.content:
Hi,

Client wants to change credit segment assigned to a sales area / company code. But there are 2 years worth of transactional data in the system for this entity. What would be the impacts of changing the credit segment now for open orders, master data, invoices posted, etc.?

Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: Excise Invoice Goods Receipt Procedure India with EWM
entry.content:
Referring to help.sap document related to External Procurement (Imports) in country India.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/240fcdcc71c640ea9aa9691500b34889/889ad7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html

Legal requirement to capture excise invoices for Bills of Entry.  Procedure refers only to Entering of Goods Receipt in MM via Migo where pop-up will appear at GR posting to capture excise invoice number for the Bill of Entry. 

Request for information how this procedure needs to be executed with the use of SAP EWM when GR is posted in SAP EWM and communicated back to ERP.

entry.title: Purchase Order API API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV
entry.content:
Hi

To create purchase orders using API we are planning to use API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV. With this API we are able to create a PO with Multiple line items.

We are unable to post multiple line items for existing PO. Kindly let us know whether this API has the feature to add/update multiple line items in existing PO. If yes kindly share the payload format for addition of multiple PO line item in existing PO

Tried with URI

/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurchaseOrderItem

 and Post option but getting issue while posting API

Payload:

[
{
"PurchaseOrder": "8500000021",
"PurchaseOrderItemText": "OData API test",
"OrderQuantity": "1",
"PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit": "PC",
"DocumentCurrency": "MXP",
"AccountAssignmentCategory": "P",
"Material": "GNA2262840",
"_PurOrdAccountAssignment": [
{
"Quantity": "1",
"OrderQuantityUnit": "PC",
"ProjectNetwork": "901656530",
"NetworkActivity": "0030"
}
]
},
{
"PurchaseOrder": "8500000021",
"PurchaseOrderItemText": "OData API test2",
"OrderQuantity": "1",
"PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit": "PC",
"DocumentCurrency": "MXP",
"AccountAssignmentCategory": "P",
"Material": "GNA2262840",
"_PurOrdAccountAssignment": [
{
"Quantity": "1",
"OrderQuantityUnit": "PC",
"ProjectNetwork": "901656530",
"NetworkActivity": "0030"
}
]
}
]

FYI- we are able to successfully update/post 1  line item in exiting PO.

We are also trying to use Odata V4 API but status is 201 and data is not getting created in system

Kindly share your comments on usability of ODATA v2 and V4 Po API.

 

Thanks

Deepthi

entry.title: Why is S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in? HANA has also encountered this before
entry.content: S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in, prompted with incorrect name or password. Hana has experienced this before, may I ask why it happened? How can I reset my password？

entry.title: MIC Results not displayed or recorded in IW32 Order Checklists List of results Insp. Characteristic
entry.content:
Hello,

After genetaring a checklists in a order (release + save).  We try to enter the result in the Checklists tab / List of results.  When choosing a catalog code in Result colunm of a Inspection characteristic in editing mode, the code and its definition appear correctly.  When I save, the results disappear even though the message "Saved Sucessfully." Message No. EAM_IDMS204
In table QAME the entries of the inspection lot are there but I don't see the result.  And there is no entries in QASR.  

 When Using QE02 to enter a result, after saving we still see the result in Change Results: Characteristic Overview but not in List of results of order (IW32) Checklists tab.

In IW32, BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS is called but not in QE02.

Is there a way to make the result appear in this ALV ?

Thank you
